arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Aston Villa with big midfield question answered
arts.sum: After that 4-0 win over IIpswich Town last weekend, few would blame Eddie Howe for keeping the same Newcastle United XI for today's Premier League clash with Aston Villa at St James' Park. That could mean Joelinton's physical presence may be a deciding element today, with Willock a strong option to change things from the bench.

arts.ttl: Paul Mitchell's 'three in and three out' Newcastle United dream as January window approaches
arts.sum: Have a bit of a clear out and as I mentioned in past podcasts when we sat down with Paul Mitchell a few weeks after he arrived, he talked about like a recycling of the squad that you could get every window - he was looking at like three in, three out. "I think they're going to have to work out deals to get rid of fringe players to free up whatever the money can," Simon told episode host Andrew Musgrove.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery's side bidding to avoid ending 89-year streak in Boxing Day fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to avoid equalling an 89-year streak when they face Newcastle United in the Premier League on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle take on Aston Villa in a hugely exciting Boxing Day sparring match at St James’ Park. The two teams have upset the status quo to secure Champions League qualification over the last two seasons and each are targeting the top four again. arts.ttl: Eddie Howe offers Kieran Trippier update as Newcastle United transfer speculation lingers
arts.sum: When asked how Trippier can be kept motivated with a new role of squad player, not least after the near miss with Bayern, Howe told Chronicle Live: "I don't think anything is as clear-cut as that. Eddie Howe has insisted that Kieran Trippier remains a "valuable" member of his Newcastle United squad.

arts.ttl: How Tonali finally found his place at Newcastle
arts.sum: When Newcastle signed Sandro Tonali for £55m in 2023, they recruited one of the hottest properties in Italian football.

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes not 'lying' as Newcastle United star makes feelings clear amid Man City talk
arts.sum: It has been a year dominated by links to Manchester City, but Bruno declared 'this is the team where I feel like home'. I feel like one of them so every time I play, I don't just play for Bruno or my family - I play for Newcastle United .
